_synthetic_notice: ALL DATA IN THIS FILE IS SYNTHETIC AND FOR DEMONSTRATION ONLY. The molecule 'rimcazumab' / brand 'Psoridex' is fictional. No real clinical, safety, or economic claim is made or implied. Replace with client evidence after NDA/GxP controls.

therapy.indication: Moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis in adults who are candidates for systemic therapy
therapy.dosing: 150 mg at weeks 0 and 4, then every 12 weeks

key_endpoints.label: PASI 90
key_endpoints.description: ≥90% improvement in Psoriasis Area and Severity Index

key_endpoints.label: DLQI 0/1
key_endpoints.description: Dermatology Life Quality Index — no impact on quality of life
